stemHtml: What are the characteristics of an RA (Resolution Advisory) generated by TCAS above 1600 ft AGL?

options.a: An amber disc on the display unit, an annunciation (eg 'TRAFFIC, TRAFFIC') and at the end of the RA sequence the annunciation 'RETURN TO FLIGHT LEVEL'.
options.b: A yellow square on the display unit, an annunciation (eg 'CLIMB, CLIMB') and at the end of the RA sequence the annunciation 'RETURN TO FLIGHT LEVEL'.
options.c: A red disc on the display unit, an annunciation (eg 'TRAFFIC, TRAFFIC') and at the end of the RA sequence the annunciation 'CLEAR OF CONFLICT'.
options.d: A red square on the display unit, an annunciation (eg 'CLIMB, CLIMB') and at the end of the RA sequence the annunciation 'CLEAR OF CONFLICT'.
